HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Feb-27-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling adopted. Hearing on Claim of Exemption. The hearing is ordered off calendar as the Sheriff has released the exempt funds. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
